name: BONGO CAT
description: Bongo Cat is one of the most iconic cat memes of all time. A symbol of rhythm, joy, and good vibes, Bongo Cat captures the playful spirit of internet culture. Fair launched on Solana and driven by the community, it celebrates memes, music, and collective fun. With every beat, Bongo Cat brings people together to tap along, share creativity, and spread positive energy across the internet. Be happy and bongo on!
